issue_title: Display test: Leading spaces in text email are not rendered properly
issue_body_preview:
### Your environment

Firefox

### Steps to reproduce

Take an email like this one;
https://mail.kde.org/pipermail/plasma-devel/2021-June/120393.html
and render it in your web client.

### Expected behavior

User typed leading spaces in order to create an indented list.
For instance
``
test_description_zh: 在CTemplar邮件客户端中查看一封纯文本邮件，该邮件内容中包含以空格缩进的文本行（例如缩进列表），观察邮件正文中前导空格是否正确渲染显示。
expected_result_zh: 邮件正文中的前导空格应被正确渲染，缩进的文本行应保持原始的空格缩进格式，呈现出用户预期的缩进列表效果，而不是将前导空格吞掉导致所有行左对齐。
